languages.text: "Стереотипный фанатик из вашего примитивного сомна. Потому в моей коллекции столь мало экспонатов из числа Человечества: вы одинаковые. Вы все подобны этой "Чорде", отличаясь лишь степенью заблуждения относительно своей уникальности. Банальщина, прискорбная банальщина..."

"A quintessential fanatic from your primitive kind. That is why there are so few exhibits of Humanity in my collection: you are all the same. You are all like this 'Chorda,' differing only in the degree of delusion as to your uniqueness. Dull, deplorably dull..."
languages.original_text: "Стереотипный фанатик из вашего примитивного сомна. Потому в моей коллекции столь мало экспонатов из числа Человечества: вы одинаковые. Вы все подобны этой "Чорде", отличаясь лишь степенью заблуждения относительно своей уникальности. Банальщина, прискорбная банальщина..."

traits.locale_text: "A quintessential fanatic from your primitive kind. That is why there are so few exhibits of Humanity in my collection: you are all the same. You are all like this 'Chorda,' differing only in the degree of delusion as to your uniqueness. Dull, deplorably dull..."

"A quintessential fanatic from your primitive kind. That is why there are so few exhibits of Humanity in my collection: you are all the same. You are all like this 'Chorda,' differing only in the degree of delusion as to your uniqueness. Dull, deplorably dull..."

"A quintessential fanatic from your primitive kind. That is why there are so few exhibits of Humanity in my collection: you are all the same. You are all like this 'Chorda,' differing only in the degree of delusion as to your uniqueness. Dull, deplorably dull..."

languages.text: «Un perfecto ejemplo de fanática de tu primitiva especie. Por eso la Humanidad tiene tan pocos especímenes en mi colección: sois todos iguales. Sois todos como esta "Chorda", diferentes solo en el grado de delirio de ser distintos. Tediosos, lamentablemente tediosos...».
languages.original_text: "A quintessential fanatic from your primitive kind. That is why there are so few exhibits of Humanity in my collection: you are all the same. You are all like this 'Chorda,' differing only in the degree of delusion as to your uniqueness. Dull, deplorably dull..."

traits.locale_text: «Un perfecto ejemplo de fanática de tu primitiva especie. Por eso la Humanidad tiene tan pocos especímenes en mi colección: sois todos iguales. Sois todos como esta "Chorda", diferentes solo en el grado de delirio de ser distintos. Tediosos, lamentablemente tediosos...».

languages.text: “你们这个原始物种里最典型的狂热分子。这就是为什么在我的收藏中，人类展品寥寥无几的原因：你们全都一个样。你们都跟这个‘库尔达’如出一辙，唯一的区别，只在于你们对自己有多‘与众不同’的妄想程度深浅罢了。乏味，真是可悲的乏味……”
languages.original_text: "A quintessential fanatic from your primitive kind. That is why there are so few exhibits of Humanity in my collection: you are all the same. You are all like this 'Chorda,' differing only in the degree of delusion as to your uniqueness. Dull, deplorably dull..."

traits.locale_text: “你们这个原始物种里最典型的狂热分子。这就是为什么在我的收藏中，人类展品寥寥无几的原因：你们全都一个样。你们都跟这个‘库尔达’如出一辙，唯一的区别，只在于你们对自己有多‘与众不同’的妄想程度深浅罢了。乏味，真是可悲的乏味……”

languages.text: « Un exemple typique du fanatisme qui anime votre espèce primitive. Voilà pourquoi j'ai si peu de spécimens de l'Humanité dans ma collection : vous êtes tous pareils. Chorda ne diffère des autres que par le degré d'illusion qu'elle se fait quant à votre singularité. C'est déplorablement ennuyeux... »
languages.original_text: "A quintessential fanatic from your primitive kind. That is why there are so few exhibits of Humanity in my collection: you are all the same. You are all like this 'Chorda,' differing only in the degree of delusion as to your uniqueness. Dull, deplorably dull..."

traits.locale_text: « Un exemple typique du fanatisme qui anime votre espèce primitive. Voilà pourquoi j'ai si peu de spécimens de l'Humanité dans ma collection : vous êtes tous pareils. Chorda ne diffère des autres que par le degré d'illusion qu'elle se fait quant à votre singularité. C'est déplorablement ennuyeux... »

languages.text: "İlkel türe mensup klasik bir bağnaz. Koleksiyonumda İnsanlık örneklerinin bu kadar az olmasının nedeni de bu... Hepiniz aynısınız. Hepiniz bu 'Chorda' gibisiniz, sadece benzersizliğinize dair kuruntularınız farklı seviyelerde. Sıkıcı, acınası derecede sıkıcı..."
languages.original_text: "A quintessential fanatic from your primitive kind. That is why there are so few exhibits of Humanity in my collection: you are all the same. You are all like this 'Chorda,' differing only in the degree of delusion as to your uniqueness. Dull, deplorably dull..."

traits.locale_text: "İlkel türe mensup klasik bir bağnaz. Koleksiyonumda İnsanlık örneklerinin bu kadar az olmasının nedeni de bu... Hepiniz aynısınız. Hepiniz bu 'Chorda' gibisiniz, sadece benzersizliğinize dair kuruntularınız farklı seviyelerde. Sıkıcı, acınası derecede sıkıcı..."

languages.text: "Ein vollendeter Fanatiker eurer primitiven Art. Deshalb gibt es so wenige menschliche Exponate in meiner Sammlung: ihr seid alle gleich. Ihr seid alle wie dieser 'Chorda'. Ihr unterscheidet euch nur durch den Grad der Selbsttäuschung hinsichtlich eurer Einzigartigkeit. Geistlos, bedauernswert geistlos ..."
languages.original_text: "A quintessential fanatic from your primitive kind. That is why there are so few exhibits of Humanity in my collection: you are all the same. You are all like this 'Chorda,' differing only in the degree of delusion as to your uniqueness. Dull, deplorably dull..."

traits.locale_text: "Ein vollendeter Fanatiker eurer primitiven Art. Deshalb gibt es so wenige menschliche Exponate in meiner Sammlung: ihr seid alle gleich. Ihr seid alle wie dieser 'Chorda'. Ihr unterscheidet euch nur durch den Grad der Selbsttäuschung hinsichtlich eurer Einzigartigkeit. Geistlos, bedauernswert geistlos ..."

languages.text: "あなた方の原始的な種族の典型的な狂信者だ。だから、私のコレクションには人類の展示品がほとんどないのだ。あなた方は皆、この『チョルダ』のようなもので、自分の独自性についての妄想の度合いが違うだけなのだ。つまらない、嘆かわしいほどつまらない...」。
languages.original_text: "A quintessential fanatic from your primitive kind. That is why there are so few exhibits of Humanity in my collection: you are all the same. You are all like this 'Chorda,' differing only in the degree of delusion as to your uniqueness. Dull, deplorably dull..."
